quote: Everything happens for a reason. Sometimes the reason is you're stupid and make bad decisions.
author: Marion G. Harmon

quote: Every dead body on Mt. Everest was once a highly motivated person, so… maybe calm down.
The light at the end of the tunnel has been turned off due to budget cuts.
Never put off till tomorrow what you can avoid altogether.
Hard work never killed anyone, but why take the chance?
If at first you don't succeed, failure may be your style.
author: Quentin Crisp

quote: Always remember you're unique — just like everyone else.
The beatings will continue until morale improves.
You don't have to be faster than the bear, you just have to be faster than the slowest person with you.
There are no stupid questions, but there are a lot of inquisitive idiots.
Doing a job right the first time gets the job done. Doing the job wrong fourteen times gives you job security.
Eagles may soar, but weasels don't get sucked into jet engines.
If you can stay calm while all around you is chaos, then you probably haven't completely understood the situation.
Quitters never win, winners never quit, but those who never win and never quit are idiots.
Not all who wander are lost — but some of us just have terrible sense of direction.
The key to success is not through achievement but through enthusiasm.
author: Malcolm Forbes

quote: You can do anything, but not everything.
author: David Allen

quote: There are two rules for success: 1. Never reveal everything you know.
Failure is always an option.
If you think you can, you're right. If you think you can't, you're also right.
The secret to getting ahead is getting started. The secret to getting started is... also unclear.
Work smarter, not harder, and try not to look too confused about what that means.
Change is inevitable, except from vending machines.
I always arrive late at the office, but I make up for it by leaving early.
author: Charles Lamb

quote: When the going gets tough, the tough get going — somewhere else.
You miss 100% of the naps you don't take.
Live every day as if it were your last. Eventually you'll be right.
Ambition is the last refuge of the failure.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: If you want something done right, you're probably going to have to do it yourself, unfortunately.
A person who never made a mistake never tried anything — or covered their tracks perfectly.
The road to success is always under construction.
author: Lily Tomlin

quote: Success is just failure that hasn't happened yet.
Dream big, because reality is overrated.
You only live once — but if you do it wrong, once is enough.
author: Mae West

quote: The early bird gets the worm, but the second mouse gets the cheese.
I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have — and the less time I have to enjoy it.
Teamwork makes the dream work, assuming everyone agrees on what the dream is.
Don't worry about the world coming to an end today. It's already tomorrow in Australia.
author: Charles M. Schulz

quote: The best way to appreciate your job is to imagine yourself without one — then panic.
Progress always involves risk. You can't steal second base and keep your foot on first.
author: Frederick B. Wilcox

quote: No one on their deathbed ever said, 'I wish I had spent more time at the office' — but here you are anyway.
Aim for the stars! In the unlikely event you miss, you'll land in the cold vacuum of space.
Some people dream of success while others stay awake and actually achieve it — and look exhausted.
The elevator to success is out of order. You'll have to use the stairs — one step at a time, like everyone else.
If you're going through hell, keep going — it probably won't get better, but at least you'll be moving.
Think like a proton: always positive. Or a neutron: neutral and forgotten.
Believe you can and you're halfway there. The other half is the part where it gets really hard.
You are confined only by the walls you build yourself. Unfortunately, you're a very good builder.
Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does — just maybe not the difference you intended.
Opportunities don't happen. You create them — and then watch someone else take credit.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop — although at some point it matters a little.
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it, and too tired to celebrate.
Don't count the days, make the days count — unless you're on a deadline, in which case definitely count the days.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started. The secret of getting started is unclear to most people.
Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life — you're doing a poor enough job with your own.
If you hear a voice within you say 'you cannot paint,' then by all means paint — and prove them right or wrong.
We may encounter many defeats but we must not be defeated — though it's okay to take a long nap.
Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after another. So you're basically always racing.
Be yourself — unless you can be a wizard. Always be a wizard if given the option.
If opportunity doesn't knock, build a door — and then wait for someone with actual skills to use it.
I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work, and I'm still going.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Do not go where the path may lead; go instead where there is no path — and then wonder why you're lost.
You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think. Probably. We'll see.
Nothing in the world is worth having or doing unless it means effort, pain, difficulty — enjoy.
It always seems impossible until it's done — and then everyone asks why it took so long.
The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams — and also those with good networking skills.
Either write something worth reading or do something worth writing about. Or just stare at a blank screen.
Light travels faster than sound. This is why some people appear bright until you hear them speak.
author: Alan Dundes

quote: Just because we accept you as you are doesn't mean we've abandoned hope you'll improve.
Never underestimate the power of stupid people in large groups.
If life doesn't break you today, don't worry. It will try again tomorrow.
People who say they'll give 110% don't understand how percentages work.
A thousand-mile journey starts with one step. Then again, so does falling in a ditch and breaking your neck.
Two things are infinite: the universe and human stupidity; and I'm not sure about the universe.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: If you never try anything new, you'll miss out on many of life's great disappointments.
If at first you don't succeed, try, try again. Then quit. No use being a damn fool about it.
author: W.C. Fields

quote: It could be that your purpose in life is to serve as a warning to others.
author: Ashleigh Brilliant

quote: Today is the first day of the rest of your life. But so was yesterday, and look how that turned out.
Just because you are unique doesn't mean you are useful.
Oh, you hate your job? Why didn't you say so? There's a support group for that. It's called EVERYBODY, and they meet at the bar.
author: Drew Carey

quote: I am free of all prejudice. I hate everyone equally.
author: W.C. Fields

quote: Multitasking – the art of doing twice as much as you should half as well as you could.
The story so far: In the beginning, the Universe was created. This has made a lot of people very angry and been widely regarded as a bad move.
author: Douglas Adams

quote: Life is pain. Anyone who says otherwise is selling something.
author: William Goldman

quote: When life knocks you down, stay there and take a nap.
Nothing says 'you're a loser' more than owning a motivational poster about being a winner.
Not everything is a lesson. Sometimes you just fail.
Fate is like a strange, unpopular restaurant filled with odd little waiters who bring you things you never asked for and don't always like.
author: Lemony Snicket

quote: The worst part of success is trying to find someone who is happy for you.
author: Bette Midler

quote: Your life can't fall apart if you never had it together.
Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: A day without sunshine is like, you know, night.
author: Steve Martin

quote: If you try to fail, and succeed, which have you done?
author: George Carlin

quote: People say nothing is impossible, but I do nothing every day.
author: A.A. Milne

quote: Even if you are on the right track, you'll get run over if you just sit there.
author: Will Rogers

quote: Never put off until tomorrow what you can do the day after tomorrow.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Follow your passion, stay true to yourself, never follow someone else's path — unless you're in the woods and you're lost and you see a path, then by all means follow that.
author: Ellen DeGeneres

quote: Life is like a sewer… what you get out of it depends on what you put into it.
author: Tom Lehrer

quote: People often say that motivation doesn't last. Well, neither does bathing – that's why we recommend it daily.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: If you think you are too small to make a difference, try sleeping with a mosquito.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: When I hear somebody sigh, 'Life is hard', I am always tempted to ask, 'Compared to what?'
author: Sydney Harris

quote: I always wanted to be somebody, but now I realize I should have been more specific.
author: Lily Tomlin

quote: There's never enough time to do all the nothing you want.
author: Bill Watterson

quote: Life is a shipwreck, but we must not forget to sing in the lifeboats.
author: Voltaire

quote: I didn't fail the test. I just found 100 ways to do it wrong.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: When life gives you lemons, squirt someone in the eye.
author: Cathy Guisewite

quote: Here is a test to find whether your mission on earth is finished: if you're alive, it isn't.
author: Richard Bach

quote: I'll probably never fully become what I wanted to be when I grew up, but that's probably because I wanted to be a ninja princess.
author: Cassandra Duffy

quote: By working faithfully eight hours a day you may eventually get to be boss and work twelve hours a day.
author: Robert Frost

quote: My therapist told me the way to achieve true inner peace is to finish what I start. So far I've finished two bags of M&Ms and a chocolate cake. I feel better already.
author: Dave Barry

quote: Whoever said 'it's not whether you win or lose that counts' probably lost.
author: Martina Navratilova

quote: If you fall, I'll always be there.
author: The Floor

quote: I intend to live forever. So far, so good.
author: Steven Wright

quote: A person should not be too honest. Straight trees are cut first and honest people are screwed first.
author: Chanakya

quote: Most of what we call management consists of making it difficult for people to get their work done.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Expecting the world to treat you fairly because you are a good person is a little like expecting the bull not to attack you because you are a vegetarian.
